exemplar.title:
Using Mathematics to Determine the Most Cost-Efficient Type of Toilet Paper 
for Consumers Shopping in Biedronka

Using Mathematics to Determine the Most Cost-Efficient Type of Toilet Paper 
for Consumers Shopping in Biedronka

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: The report follows a clear sequence (introduction, background, data, calculation, conclusion).
Headings, numbered tables and formula labels give a recognisable structure.
Most content directly supports the research question with limited irrelevant material.
weaknesses: Transitions between sections can be abrupt and some modelling choices lack full justification.
Repetition of formulas and lengthy volume calculations reduce conciseness.
Formatting issues (empty table cells, misplaced text fragments, missing page numbers) interrupt the flow.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration demonstrates coherence and basic organization but is not exceptionally concise or polished. Multiple minor organisational and formatting issues prevent a higher band, so a score of 2/4 reflects solid structure with room for tighter presentation.

strengths: Symbols, units and variables are defined and used correctly in most cases.
Effective use of tables, hand-drawn and GeoGebra-style diagrams aids comprehension.
Logical progression of steps, with numbered formulas and intermediate results, ensures clear communication.
weaknesses: Inconsistent notation (âzÅâ vs âzhâ, a/b vs Î±/Î²) can confuse readers.
Occasional unit-notation errors (e.g., '[z\text{k}]') and formatting glitches.
Some decimal and rounding conventions are not uniformly applied.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical language and notation are mostly consistent, and multiple representations are used effectively. Minor slips in notation and formatting prevent an excellent band, making 3/4 an appropriate reflection of the solid communication.

strengths: A vivid anecdote and personal wager engage the reader and demonstrate genuine motivation.
weaknesses: The mathematical approach is largely standard with limited independent extension.
Creativity in applying integration over a simple geometric formula is modest.
Initiative is shown but does not reach a high level of novelty.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: There is clear personal engagement in the choice of topic and narrative style, but independent thinking and creativity remain at a basic level, meriting 1/3.

strengths: Reflection links quantitative results to real-world consumer decisions meaningfully.
weaknesses: Evaluation of measurement errors and scope is brief, with no concrete proposals for improvement.
Critical analysis touches on results comparison but lacks depth.
Opportunities to discuss sample size and error mitigation are not pursued.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work shows some meaningful reflection but the evaluation of outcomes is limited and shallow. A score of 1/3 captures the presence of reflection without the critical depth required for higher bands.

strengths: All mathematics used (volume integrals, averages, cost ratios) is relevant and correctly applied.
Calculations are logically executed and lead directly to the cost-efficiency ranking.
Units are stated and final results follow coherently from the methods.
weaknesses: Mathematical techniques remain elementary SL content without extension to higher-level analysis.
Some level-appropriateness issues (basic integrals, no advanced error analysis).
Minor inconsistencies in numerical values and significant-figure conventions.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student applies relevant SL mathematics competently and accurately, but without broader or more sophisticated use. A score of 2/6 reflects correct, relevant work that does not consistently reach full course-level expectations.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanations of each computational step, together with numbered formulas and intermediate results, give the work a clear logical thread. Occasional formatting glitches mean the communication is not âexcellent,â but it is certainly clear and logically structured.

Calculations are executed accurately, units are usually stated, and final rankings follow logically from numerical results. Minor slips (typographical unit errors, rounding inconsistencies) prevent a flawless performance but still indicate good understanding and mostly correct work, aligning with band 4.

The student employs tables for raw data and results, formula boxes, a hand-drawn diagram and a GeoGebra-style 3-D representation of the toilet-paper cylinder, showing âeffectiveâ use of multiple representations. Additional graphical analysis could enhance interpretation, so the highest band is not warranted.

The exploration follows a clear sequence (introduction, mathematical background, data, calculation, conclusion, evaluation). Arguments progress logically from identifying a real-life problem to choosing a mathematical model, collecting measurements, calculating volume and finally ranking cost efficiency. The line of reasoning is rarely broken; however, transitions could be smoother and justification for some modelling choices is brief, preventing the work from reaching the highest descriptor.

Applying integration to a context where a geometric formula already exists shows some initiative, and devising a price-to-volume metric shows creativity, but the mathematical novelty is limited; hence a mid-level band is appropriate.

The student analyses two different pricing metrics and explains how they can lead to different rankings. This shows thoughtful, though not deep, analysis of the results and their context, meeting the descriptor for band 2.

The evaluation lists measurement error, rounding and limited scope as shortcomings but offers only brief commentary on their impact and no concrete improvements. This limited evaluation fulfills band-1 descriptors rather than the more comprehensive requirements of higher bands.

Reflection appears in the conclusion and evaluation sections, discussing how results inform consumer choices and acknowledging measurement uncertainty. These comments are meaningful but not probing, aligning with âmeaningful reflection throughout.â

Mathematical symbols, integral notation, units and variables are used correctly in most cases, and symbols are defined when first introduced. Minor slips (e.g. âzHâ for zÅ, inconsistent use of superscripts) occur but do not impede understanding, matching the descriptor of âmostly consistentâ usage.

The studentâs personal narrative, justification for preferring integration over a simple formula, and the wager with the parent show a genuine personal approach. Innovation is modest, placing the work firmly in the second band.

Most of the 21 pages are devoted to data, calculations and discussion directly connected to the research question; extraneous narrative is limited to a short anecdote about the wager with the studentâs father. Some repetition occurs when formulas are re-stated and volume calculations are shown at length for every roll, so the work is not âhighlyâ concise.

All mathematics (cylinder volume, averages, unit-cost ratios) is relevant to answering the research question, and each technique is applied correctly. However, the mathematics remains elementary and does not extend beyond standard SL content, so higher bands for comprehensive or expert use are not justified.

Choosing an everyday problem and deciding to compare price-to-volume rather than standard price-per-sheet demonstrates the studentâs own thinking, but the mathematical technique (volume of a hollow cylinder) is standard. The evidence therefore sits at âsignificantâ rather than âoutstanding.â

Headings, sub-headings, numbered tables and formula labels give the report a recognizable structure. Each section contains the information the table of contents promises, and references appear at the end. Nevertheless, occasional blank columns in tables and some misplaced text fragments reveal minor organisational weaknesses that keep the strand from being âexceptionally well-organised.â

Integration of constants and basic ratio calculations are mostly at or below SL level; they do not reflect HL sophistication such as optimisation, regression or error propagation. Thus the work is âmostlyâ at course level rather than fully commensurate, meriting band 2.

annotations.comment: The table of contents lacks page numbers, which reduces navigability and clarity; ensure all sections include accurate page references.
The introduction effectively personalizes the investigation with a vivid anecdote and the wager, demonstrating a strong personal engagement and motivation.
While the anecdote is engaging, its length could be condensed to enhance conciseness and maintain focus on the research objective.
Notation inconsistency: the formula uses a and b, but later describes the limits as Î± and Î². Use consistent symbols throughout to avoid confusion.
The citation '(Dawkins, 2014)' should follow a formal reference style such as APA and include page numbers for completeness.
The derivation linking the integral approach to the geometric formula is clearly articulated, reinforcing conceptual understanding of volume calculation.
Unit notation varies between 'zÅ' and 'zh'; ensure you consistently use the correct symbol 'zÅ' for currency in all expressions.
Consider justifying why three measurements per type are sufficient for reliable results, possibly discussing sample size and variability to strengthen your methodology.
Including a clear diagram of the roll measurements effectively supports multiple representations and aids visual comprehension of the variables.
Table 1 contains blank header columns which disrupt the structure; remove empty cells or consolidate columns for improved clarity.
The formula radius = diameter/2 is correct, but it would benefit from explicit unit annotation (e.g., [cm]) to reinforce precision in mathematical communication.
The combined table for Types 3 and 4 merges different datasets, which can be confusing; consider splitting into separate tables for each type.
The unit '[z\text{k}]' in this calculation appears incorrect; revise to '[zÅ]' to accurately represent the currency unit.
Please clarify the inclusion of absolute value bars in the integrand; since R(x) â¥ r(x), the expression inside should inherently be non-negative.
Specify the numerical value of Ï used and maintain consistent significant figures when presenting intermediate and final results to strengthen accuracy.
In Table 5, the styling of roll numbers (bold vs. overline) is not explained and may confuse readers; define the notation or use a consistent format.
The average volume is listed as 738.353 in Table 6 but used as 738.535 here; verify the correct value to ensure calculation consistency.
Table 7 shows 'Type2' without a space and inconsistent capitalization; standardize labels for professional presentation.
The text 'to let paper' appears to be a typo for 'toilet paper'; correct OCR or typographical errors to maintain professionalism.
Table 8 is empty and redundant; remove this placeholder or populate it with relevant data to avoid breaks in the report's flow.
Clarify the repeating decimal notation '0.009(3)' by either rounding to a fixed decimal place or expressing it as a fraction for clearer interpretation.
The sentence continues onto the next page, disrupting continuity; adjust page breaks or reflow text to maintain seamless reading.
The conclusion effectively relates quantitative findings to consumer decision factors, demonstrating thoughtful reflection on real-world implications.
The evaluation acknowledges measurement uncertainty but stops short of proposing specific strategies to quantify or mitigate errors; consider outlining improvements.
References lack uniform formatting (e.g., publisher location, page numbers); adopt a consistent referencing style throughout for academic rigor.
